creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #1)

> I cannot find a way to do this directly in Steam.

You type either name or appid into the search bar in the game list at the left side of the library view. Then you install it as usual.

> Maybe the installation from the shell could also be described as an alternative?

It's mentioned there:

https://github.com/shkhln/linuxulator-steam-utils/blob/91e677c6db968041d5e00d3d45fe65f0a247029b/bin/lsu-register-proton#L56-L63
